title: Green solve_all scales linearly with measurement channels
description: GreenSolver.solve_all solves one Neumann linear system per measurement row. Runtime grows directly with electrode/reference channel count.
evidence: green/green_solver.py loops over row_indices and calls solve_one for each row.
recommendation: Profile per-row Green solve time, add transfer matrix caching, then evaluate parallel row solves or block RHS solving.

title: Fixed: DOLFINx candidate point location uses a cached locator
description: Candidate/source points now use DOLFINxP1TetraLocator, which caches dof coordinates, local cell geometry and a centroid KD-tree and performs batched barycentric verification.
evidence: fem/p1_locator.py owns the cache; sources/rhs_assembly.py and green/gradients.py share it. scripts/profile_components.py exposes point-location and green-transfer profiles.
recommendation: Retain component profiles and add distributed/global ownership or DOLFINx BVH support if MPI becomes a requirement.

title: Fixed: node-to-dof mapping is cached on the FEM solver
description: Green RHS creation maps MeshData-node ordered rows through FEMProblem.p1_node_dof_mapping(), which caches both mapping directions for the solver.
evidence: fem/neumann_poisson.py owns _p1_node_dof_mapping and fem/mesh_conversion.py delegates build_node_to_dof_map_p1 to that cache.
recommendation: Replace the serial coordinate mapping with ownership-aware mapping before distributed MPI benchmarks.

title: Central surface projection still loops over all surface triangles per projected electrode
description: Cached CentralSurfaceProjector avoids repeated triangle array creation, but projection remains O(N_projected * N_surface_cells).
recommendation: Vectorize ray-triangle intersection or add a surface acceleration structure for projection rays.

title: Green functions retained in memory by default
description: GreenSolver defaults to keep_functions=True, which stores one DOLFINx Function per measurement channel.
evidence: green/green_solver.py appends each function when keep_functions is true; transfer construction requires retained functions.
recommendation: Add chunked transfer construction or a keep_functions=False streaming path for large electrode/candidate runs.

title: Benchmark workflows rely on caller-managed caching
description: Forward/inverse benchmark runners can repeat solver, measurement operator or transfer matrix construction when scenarios are not manually organized around shared objects.
evidence: benchmark runners are intentionally simple and accept factories/results but do not own GreenTransferMatrix cache orchestration.
recommendation: Add benchmark-level cache keys for geometry, electrode subsets, reference systems and GreenTransferMatrix files.

title: Single-dipole inverse loop is scalar over candidates
description: Inverse search solves an independent 3-parameter LS problem per candidate in Python.
evidence: inverse/single_dipole.py builds candidates with a Python list comprehension over candidate indices.
recommendation: Vectorize normal-equation assembly/residual computation for large candidate grids or add a batched numpy path.

title: Surface MeshData may keep full global point arrays
description: Extracted surface meshes can retain the full point array from the original mesh, increasing memory and diagnostics counts.
evidence: Example diagnostics distinguish surface point-array size from used surface vertices.
recommendation: Consider optional compact_surface_mesh helper for export/diagnostics workflows where global ids are not needed.

title: ForwardSolver already caches measurement node-to-dof map per instance
description: Forward measurement evaluation keeps _node_to_dof_map after first solve, reducing repeated forward measurement overhead.
recommendation: Resolved in Green RHS through the shared FEM mapping cache; keep one solver per geometry to retain the cache.
